steps.expression: async () => { const stamp = Date.now(); const title = `Runtime Error Scenario ${stamp}`; const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!settings.ok) { return `settings:${settings.error.userMessage}`; } const providerId = Object.keys(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider)[0]; if (providerId === undefined) { return 'no-provider'; } const memberSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Runtime Error Member ${stamp}`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper member.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull: null }); if (!memberSave.ok) { return `agent-save:${memberSave.error.userMessage}`; } const memberId = memberSave.value.agent.id; const saved = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title, topic: 'Verify normalized runtime error UI', goal: 'Show concise council runtime errors with optional details', mode: 'manual', tags: ['scenario', 'runtime-error'], memberAgentIds: [memberId], memberColorsByAgentId: { [memberId]: '#0f766e' }, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); if (!saved.ok) { return `save:${saved.error.userMessage}`; } window.localStorage.setItem('runtimeErrorScenarioCouncilTitle', title); window.localStorage.setItem('runtimeErrorScenarioMemberId', memberId); window.localStorage.setItem('runtimeErrorScenarioProviderId', providerId); return 'ok'; }

async () => { const providerId = window.localStorage.getItem('runtimeErrorScenarioProviderId'); if (providerId === null) { return 'missing-runtime-error-scenario-provider'; } const disconnected = await window.api.providers.disconnect({ viewKind: 'settings', providerId }); return disconnected.ok ? 'ok' : `disconnect:${disconnected.error.userMessage}`; }

steps.text: Refresh models or choose another one, then retry with the same member or a different one.
Signal: Model selection is unavailable for this runtime
